title: Issue Reporting and Self-PR Creation Flow
interaction_flow_issue_reporter: Caller → issueReporter: maybeReportIssue({ signals, recentEvents, sessionLog, envFingerprint })
issueReporter → issueReporter: getConfig() — reads EVOLVER_AUTO_ISSUE, EVOLVER_ISSUE_REPO env vars
issueReporter → issueReporter: shouldReport(signals, config) — checks failure_loop_detected OR (recurring_error AND high_failure_ratio), streak >= minStreak, cooldown, dedup by errorKey
issueReporter → issueReporter: getGithubToken() — reads GITHUB_TOKEN / GH_TOKEN / GITHUB_PAT
issueReporter → issueReporter: extractErrorSignature(signals) → title string (max 80 chars)
issueReporter → issueReporter: buildIssueBody(opts) — calls extractStreakCount(), extractErrorSignature(), formatRecentEvents(), redactString(sessionLog)
GitHubAPI → issueReporter: return { number, url, title } or null
issueReporter → FileSystem: writeState({ lastReportedAt, recentIssueKeys, lastIssueUrl, lastSkippedAt })
issueReporter → GitHubAPI: POST /repos/{repo}/issues { title, body } (createGithubIssue, timeout 15s)
issueReporter → FileSystem: writeState({ lastReportedAt, recentIssueKeys, lastIssueUrl, lastIssueNumber })
interaction_flow_self_pr: Caller → selfPR: maybeCreatePR({ capsule, event, mutation, gene, blastRadius })

selfPR → selfPR: guard checks — EVOLVER_SELF_PR=true, score>=SELF_PR_MIN_SCORE, streak>=SELF_PR_MIN_STREAK, mutation.category==='optimize', mutation.risk==='low', blastRadius.files/lines within limits, all changedFiles isPublicNonObfuscated()
selfPR → selfPR: isInCooldown() — reads self_pr_state.json, checks elapsed < SELF_PR_COOLDOWN_MS
selfPR → selfPR: computeDiffHash(changedFiles, repoRoot) — SHA256 of file contents
selfPR → selfPR: isDuplicateDiff(diffHash) — checks recentDiffHashes in state
selfPR → GitCLI: git diff HEAD -- {file} (getGitDiff for each changedFile, execSync)
selfPR → sanitize: fullLeakCheck(diffContent) — detects secrets/tokens in diff
selfPR → selfPR: buildPRTitle(mutation) — '[Auto-Mutation] ' + rationale.slice(0,80)
selfPR → selfPR: buildPRBody({ capsule, mutation, gene, blastRadius }) — markdown with score, streak, files, rationale
selfPR → ghCLI: runGh('repo view {repo}') — verify repo access (timeout 15s)
selfPR → FileSystem: mkdir self_pr_workdir (tmpDir)
selfPR → ghCLI: runGh('repo clone {repo} {tmpDir} -- --depth 1') (timeout 60s)
selfPR → GitCLI: execSync('git checkout -b evolver-bot/mutation-{capsuleIdShort}', { cwd: tmpDir })
selfPR → FileSystem: copyFileSync each changedFile from repoRoot → tmpDir
selfPR → GitCLI: execSync('git add -A') then execSync('git status --porcelain') then execSync('git commit -m {title}', { env: evolver-bot author })
selfPR → GitCLI: execSync('git push origin {branch}', { cwd: tmpDir, timeout 30s })
selfPR → FileSystem: writeFileSync('.pr_body.md', body)
selfPR → ghCLI: runGh('pr create --repo {repo} --head {branch} --title {title} --body-file .pr_body.md --label auto-mutation') (timeout 30s)
selfPR → FileSystem: rmSync(tmpDir, recursive)
selfPR → selfPR: recordPR(diffHash) → writeState({ lastPRAt, recentDiffHashes })
selfPR → Caller: return { attempted, ok, pr_url, branch, diff_hash }
key_relationships: issueReporter calls GitHubAPI directly via fetch()
selfPR depends_on config (SELF_PR_MIN_SCORE, SELF_PR_MIN_STREAK, SELF_PR_MAX_FILES, SELF_PR_MAX_LINES, SELF_PR_COOLDOWN_MS, SELF_PR_REPO, SELF_PR_TIMEOUT_MS)
selfPR calls ghCLI via runGh() — wraps execSync('gh ' + args)
selfPR calls GitCLI directly via execSync for checkout/add/commit/push
gitOps provides runCmd/tryRunCmd/rollback utilities — used by solidify, NOT directly called by selfPR or issueReporter in this flow

maybeReportIssue: signals includes failure_loop_detected OR (recurring_error AND high_failure_ratio)
cooldown not active OR errorKey not in recentIssueKeys (24h default)
maybeCreatePR: all changedFiles are public non-obfuscated (not in OBFUSCATED_FILES set)

data_objects.buildPRBody_input: { capsule: {id, outcome.score, success_streak, trigger[]}, mutation: {category, risk, rationale}, gene: {id}, blastRadius: {files, lines, all_changed_files[]} }

important_notes: runGh() is defined inside selfPR.js (not imported from gitOps.js); gitOps.js is separate utility for rollback/git operations
selfPR clones into a temp workdir (self_pr_workdir) inside getEvolutionDir(), copies mutated files, commits as 'evolver-bot', pushes, then opens PR via gh CLI
Both flows are non-fatal: errors are caught and logged, not re-thrown
Dedup in issueReporter: SHA256 of sorted relevant signals, 16-char hex key stored in state
Dedup in selfPR: SHA256 of file contents of changedFiles, 16-char hex hash stored in state
